ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign category */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value associated with the campaign */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system associated with the campaign */,
  "icon_image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the icon image associated with the campaign */,
  "lv_from" INTEGER /* Minimum user level required to participate in the campaign */,
  "lv_to" INTEGER /* Maximum user level required to participate in the campaign (use -1 for no upper limit) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the campaign */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the campaign */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user level */,
  "shiori_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shiori group */,
  "duplication_order" INTEGER /* Order of campaign duplication */,
  "beginner_id" INTEGER /* ID indicating if the campaign is for beginners */,
  "campaign_type" INTEGER /* Type of the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (active, paused, ended) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the campaign */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was last modified */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred by the campaign */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_icon_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("icon_image_id") REFERENCES icon_images ("icon_image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_campaign_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_category_id") REFERENCES campaign_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (to support hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the system is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icon_images" (
  "icon_image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each icon image */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the icon image */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the icon image in KB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the icon image was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the icon image */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the icon image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the icon image is active */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type of the icon image (e.g., PNG, JPEG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icon_image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the campaign received */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks the campaign received */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions (e.g., sign-ups, purchases) resulting from the campaign */,
  "participation_rate" REAL /* Percentage of users who participated in the campaign */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Percentage of users who were engaged with the campaign */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the campaign */,
  "cost_per_acquisition" TEXT /* Cost per acquisition */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Return on investment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
